name: HR & People Management
description: AI tools in recruitment are being classified as high-risk under the EU AI Act. There's an entire field working on making AI in the workplace safe, fair, and legal — and they need people who understand how hiring actually works.
trajectory: Hiring, onboarding, and organisational design experience maps to AI recruitment governance — ensuring AI hiring tools are fair.
Employment law and compliance expertise connects to EU AI Act compliance — enforcement starts August 2026.
Spotting bias in selection processes is algorithmic fairness assessment — a core AI safety concern.
AI safety orgs are growing fast and most are terrible at people management. They need HR expertise directly.

projects.title: Audit AI in hiring
projects.description: Check whether organisations are using AI in hiring and assess compliance with emerging regulation like the EU AI Act.

projects.title: Build a compliance checklist
projects.description: Create a practical checklist for organisations using AI in recruitment, covering fairness, transparency, and legal requirements.

projects.title: Translate AI regulation for HR teams
projects.description: Write plain-language guides explaining what the EU AI Act's employment provisions mean for HR practitioners.
